pve_actions.name: Steel Fangs
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.
Honed Steel Potency: 300
Additional Effect: Grants Honed Reavers
Honed Reavers Effect: Increases potency of Reaving Fangs by 100 and Reaving Maw by 20
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with Honed Steel.

pve_actions.name: Hunter's Sting
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.
Additional Effect: Grants Hunter's Instinct
Hunter's Instinct Effect: Increases damage dealt by 10%
Duration: 40s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Steel Fangs or Reaving Fangs.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Steel Fangs changes to Hunter's Sting when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Reaving Fangs
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.
Honed Reavers Potency: 300
Additional Effect: Grants Honed Steel
Honed Steel Effect: Increases potency of Steel Fangs by 100 and Steel Maw by 20
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with Honed Reavers.

pve_actions.name: Writhing Snap
pve_actions.effect: Delivers a ranged attack with a potency of 200.

pve_actions.name: Swiftskin's Sting
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.
Additional Effect: Grants Swiftscaled
Swiftscaled Effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 15%
Duration: 40s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Steel Fangs or Reaving Fangs.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Reaving Fangs changes to Swiftskin's Sting when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Steel Maw
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to all nearby enemies.
Honed Steel Potency: 140
Additional Effect: Grants Honed Reavers
Honed Reavers Effect: Increases potency of Reaving Fangs by 100 and Reaving Maw by 20
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with Honed Steel.

pve_actions.name: Flanksting Strike
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 340.
400 when executed from a target's flank.
Potencies are increased by 100 while under the effect of Flankstung Venom.
Additional Effect: Grants Hindstung Venom
Hindstung Venom Effect: Increases potency of Hindsting Strike by 100
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with other viper venom effects.
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 10
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Sting.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Hunter's Sting changes to Flanksting Strike when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Flanksbane Fang
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 340.
400 when executed from a target's flank.
Potencies are increased by 100 while under the effect of Flanksbane Venom.
Additional Effect: Grants Hindsbane Venom
Hindsbane Venom Effect: Increases potency of Hindsbane Fang by 100
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with other viper venom effects.
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 10
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Sting.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Swiftskin's Sting changes to Flanksbane Fang when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Hindsting Strike
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 340.
400 when executed from a target's rear.
Potencies are increased by 100 while under the effect of Hindstung Venom.
Additional Effect: Grants Flanksbane Venom
Flanksbane Venom Effect: Increases potency of Flanksbane Fang by 100
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with other viper venom effects.
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 10
Can only be executed after successfully landing Swiftskin's Sting.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Hunter's Sting changes to Hindsting Strike when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Hindsbane Fang
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 340.
400 when executed from a target's rear.
Potencies are increased by 100 while under the effect of Hindsbane Venom.
Additional Effect: Grants Flankstung Venom
Flankstung Venom Effect: Increases potency of Flanksting Strike by 100
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with other viper venom effects.
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 10
Can only be executed after successfully landing Swiftskin's Sting.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Swiftskin's Sting changes to Hindsbane Fang when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Reaving Maw
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to all nearby enemies.
Honed Reavers Potency: 140
Additional Effect: Grants Honed Steel
Honed Steel Effect: Increases potency of Steel Fangs by 100 and Steel Maw by 20
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with Honed Reavers.

pve_actions.name: Slither
pve_actions.effect:
Rush to a targeted enemy's or party member's location.
Maximum Charges: 3
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Hunter's Bite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Hunter's Instinct
Hunter's Instinct Effect: Increases damage dealt by 10%
Duration: 40s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Steel Maw or Reaving Maw.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Steel Maw changes to Hunter's Bite when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Swiftskin's Bite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Swiftscaled
Swiftscaled Effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 15%
Duration: 40s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Steel Maw or Reaving Maw.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Reaving Maw changes to Swiftskin's Bite when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Jagged Maw
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all nearby enemies.
Potencies are increased by 40 while under the effect of Grimhunter's Venom.
Additional Effect: Grants Grimskin's Venom
Grimskin's Venom Effect: Increases potency of Bloodied Maw by 40
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with other viper venom effects.
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 10
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Bite or Swiftskin's Bite.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Hunter's Bite changes to Jagged Maw when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Bloodied Maw
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all nearby enemies.
Potencies are increased by 40 while under the effect of Grimskin's Venom.
Additional Effect: Grants Grimhunter's Venom
Grimhunter's Venom Effect: Increases potency of Jagged Maw by 40
Duration: 60s
Effect cannot be stacked with other viper venom effects.
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 10
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Bite or Swiftskin's Bite.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Swiftskin's Bite changes to Bloodied Maw when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Serpent's Tail
pve_actions.effect: Changes to Death Rattle, Last Lash, First Legacy, Second Legacy, Third Legacy, or Fourth Legacy when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Death Rattle
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 280.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Flanksting Strike, Flanksbane Fang, Hindsting Strike, or Hindsbane Fang.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Serpent's Tail changes to Death Rattle when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Last Lash
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to all nearby enemies.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Jagged Maw or Bloodied Maw.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Serpent's Tail changes to Last Lash when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Vicewinder
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 540.
Additional Effect: Grants a Rattling Coil, up to a maximum of 3
Maximum Charges: 2
Shares a recast timer with Vicepit.

pve_actions.name: Hunter's Coil
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 630.
680 when executed from a target's flank.
Additional Effect: Grants Hunter's Instinct
Hunter's Instinct Effect: Increases damage dealt by 10%
Duration: 40s
Additional Effect: Grants Hunter's Venom
Hunter's Venom Effect: Increases potency of Twinfang Bite by 50
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 5
Upon successfully landing this action, Twinfang changes to Twinfang Bite, and Twinblood changes to Twinblood Bite.
These actions can be executed a total of two times following Hunter's Coil.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Vicewinder or Swiftskin's Coil.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Swiftskin's Coil
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 630.
680 when executed from a target's rear.
Additional Effect: Grants Swiftscaled
Swiftscaled Effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 15%
Duration: 40s
Additional Effect: Grants Swiftskin's Venom
Swiftskin's Venom Effect: Increases potency of Twinblood Bite by 50
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 5
Upon successfully landing this action, Twinfang changes to Twinfang Bite, and Twinblood changes to Twinblood Bite.
These actions can be executed a total of two times following Swiftskin's Coil.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Vicewinder or Hunter's Coil.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Vicepit
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 250 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants a Rattling Coil, up to a maximum of 3
Maximum Charges: 2
Shares a recast timer with Vicewinder.

pve_actions.name: Hunter's Den
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Hunter's Instinct
Hunter's Instinct Effect: Increases damage dealt by 10%
Duration: 40s
Additional Effect: Grants Fellhunter's Venom
Fellhunter's Venom Effect: Increases potency of Twinfang Thresh by 30
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 5
Upon successfully landing this action, Twinfang changes to Twinfang Thresh, and Twinblood changes to Twinblood Thresh.
These actions can be executed a total of two times following Hunter's Den.
Can only be executed after Vicepit or Swiftskin's Den.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Swiftskin's Den
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Swiftscaled
Swiftscaled Effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 15%
Duration: 40s
Additional Effect: Grants Fellskin's Venom
Fellskin's Venom Effect: Increases potency of Twinblood Thresh by 30
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Increases Serpent Offerings Gauge by 5
Upon successfully landing this action, Twinfang changes to Twinfang Thresh, and Twinblood changes to Twinblood Thresh.
These actions can be executed a total of two times following Swiftskin's Den.
Can only be executed after Vicepit or Hunter's Den.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Twinfang
pve_actions.effect: Changes to Twinfang Bite, Twinfang Thresh, or Uncoiled Twinfang when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Twinblood
pve_actions.effect: Changes to Twinblood Bite, Twinblood Thresh, or Uncoiled Twinblood when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Twinfang Bite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120.
Hunter's Venom Potency: 170
Additional Effect: Grants Swiftskin's Venom when executed after Hunter's Coil
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Coil or Swiftskin's Coil.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Twinfang changes to Twinfang Bite when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Twinblood Bite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120.
Swiftskin's Venom Potency: 170
Additional Effect: Grants Hunter's Venom when executed after Swiftskin's Coil
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Coil or Swiftskin's Coil.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Twinblood changes to Twinblood Bite when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Twinfang Thresh
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 50 to all nearby enemies.
Fellhunter's Venom Potency: 80
Additional Effect: Grants Fellskin's Venom when executed after Hunter's Den
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Den or Swiftskin's Den.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Twinfang changes to Twinfang Thresh when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Twinblood Thresh
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 50 to all nearby enemies.
Fellskin's Venom Potency: 80
Additional Effect: Grants Fellhunter's Venom when executed after Swiftskin's Den
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Den or Swiftskin's Den.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Twinblood changes to Twinblood Thresh when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Uncoiled Fury
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 680 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Poised for Twinfang
Poised for Twinfang Effect: Increases the potency of Uncoiled Twinfang by 50
Duration: 60s
Upon successfully landing this action, Twinfang changes to Uncoiled Twinfang, and Twinblood changes to Uncoiled Twinblood.
These actions can be executed a total of two times.
Rattling Coil Cost: 1
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Serpent's Ire
pve_actions.effect:
Grants one stack of Rattling Coil.
Grants Ready to Reawaken.
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while in combat.

pve_actions.name: Reawaken
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 750 for the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants 5 stacks of Anguine Tribute
Duration: 30s
Serpent Offerings Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: First Generation
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 480 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Potency is increased to 680 when executed after Reawaken.
Anguine Tribute Cost: 1
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Steel Fangs and Steel Maw change to First Generation when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Second Generation
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 480 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Potency is increased to 680 when executed after First Generation.
Anguine Tribute Cost: 1
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Reaving Fangs and Reaving Maw change to Second Generation when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Third Generation
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 480 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Potency is increased to 680 when executed after Second Generation.
Anguine Tribute Cost: 1
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Hunter's Coil and Hunter's Den change to Third Generation when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Fourth Generation
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 480 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Potency is increased to 680 when executed after Third Generation.
Anguine Tribute Cost: 1
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Swiftskin's Coil and Swiftskin's Den change to Fourth Generation when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Uncoiled Twinfang
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Poised for Twinfang Potency: 170
Additional Effect: Grants Poised for Twinblood
Poised for Twinblood Effect: Increases the potency of Uncoiled Twinblood by 50
Duration: 60s
Can only be executed after successfully landing Uncoiled Fury.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Twinfang changes to Uncoiled Twinfang when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Uncoiled Twinblood
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Poised for Twinblood Potency: 170
Can only be executed after successfully landing Uncoiled Fury.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Twinblood changes to Uncoiled Twinblood when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Ouroboros
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 1,150 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Reawakened effect expires upon execution.
Requires at least one stack of Anguine Tribute.
This weaponskill does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Reawaken changes to Ouroboros when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: First Legacy
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 320 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed after successfully landing First Generation.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Serpent's Tail changes to First Legacy when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Second Legacy
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 320 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Second Generation.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Serpent's Tail changes to Second Legacy when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Third Legacy
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 320 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Third Generation.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Serpent's Tail changes to Third Legacy when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Fourth Legacy
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 320 to the first enemy, and 75% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Fourth Generation.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Serpent's Tail changes to Fourth Legacy when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Second Wind
pve_actions.effect:
Instantly restores own HP.
Cure Potency: 800

pve_actions.name: Leg Sweep
pve_actions.effect:
Stuns target.
Duration: 3s

pve_actions.name: Bloodbath
pve_actions.effect:
Converts a portion of physical damage dealt into HP.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Feint
pve_actions.effect:
Lowers target's physical damage dealt by 10% and magic damage dealt by 5%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Arm's Length
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: When you are struck by a physical attack, the striker will be afflicted with Slow +20%
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: True North
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies all action direction requirements.
Duration: 10s
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Viper's Fangs
traits.effect:
Allows the execution of Death Rattle.
Can only be executed upon successfully landing Flanksting Strike, Flanksbane Fang, Hindsting Strike, or Hindsbane Fang.

traits.name: Viper's Maw
traits.effect:
Allows the execution of Last Lash.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Jagged Maw or Bloodied Maw.

traits.name: Melee Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Steel Fangs to 200, Reaving Fangs to 200, Hunter's Sting to 300, and Swiftskin's Sting to 300.

traits.name: Viper's Bite
traits.effect:
Allows the execution of Twinfang Bite and Twinblood Bite.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Coil or Swiftskin's Coil.

traits.name: Viper's Thresh
traits.effect:
Allows the execution of Twinfang Thresh and Twinblood Thresh.
Can only be executed after successfully landing Hunter's Den or Swiftskin's Den.

traits.name: Viper's Rattle
traits.effect: Grants 1 stack of Rattling Coil upon successfully landing Vicewinder or Vicepit.

traits.name: Enhanced Slither
traits.effect: Allows a third charge of Slither.

traits.name: Melee Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Flanksting Strike, Flanksbane Fang, Hindsting Strike, and Hindsbane Fang to 340.

traits.name: Enhanced Viper's Rattle
traits.effect: Allows the stacking of a third Rattling Coil.

traits.name: Serpent's Lineage
traits.effect:
Allows for Serpent Offerings Gauge accumulation upon the landing of certain actions.
Furthermore, adds an additional effect to Serpent's Ire that grants Ready to Reawaken.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Uncoiled Fangs
traits.effect: Allows the execution of Uncoiled Twinfang or Uncoiled Twinblood after successfully landing Uncoiled Fury.

traits.name: Enhanced Serpent's Lineage
traits.effect:
Allows the stacking of a fifth Anguine Tribute in the Serpent Offerings Gauge.
Furthermore, allows the execution of Ouroboros while under the effect of Reawakened.

traits.name: Serpent's Legacy
traits.effect: Allows the execution of First Legacy after successfully landing First Generation, Second Legacy after successfully landing Second Generation, Third Legacy after successfully landing Third Generation, and Fourth Legacy after successfully landing Fourth Generation.

traits.name: Enhanced Second Wind
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Second Wind to 800.

traits.name: Enhanced Feint
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Feint to 15 seconds.
